Prof. Marcus Thornton

Head of Advanced Propulsion

Oxford University

Biography Profile

A leading authority on zero-point energy manipulation, Professor Thornton has spent the last two decades challenging the fundamental limits of general relativity. His controversial yet mathematically rigorous papers on spacetime warping have sparked a new era of propulsion research. He is the author of 'The Fabric of Falling: Rethinking Gravity'.

Symposium Presentation

"Zero-Point Energy Extraction for Deep Space Thrust"

An analytical review of methods for tapping into zero-point energy fields to achieve continuous thrust without conventional propellant. We will examine the thermodynamic boundaries and proposed containment architectures.
